2606.28094.title: OSOR: One-Step Diffusion Inpainting for Effect-Aware Object Removal
2606.28094.paper_summary: Real-world object removal is challenging due to two key difficulties: the target object's non-local effects, such as shadows and reflections, which are difficult to model, and the fact that user-provided masks are often inaccurate or incomplete. With billions of parameters and tens of denoising steps, diffusion-based models achieve strong removal performance at the expense of substantial computational cost, limiting their use in interactive applications and on edge devices. To address these challenges, we present OSOR (One-Step Object Removal), which simultaneously achieves efficient, effect-aware, and mask-robust object removal. Concretely, OSOR introduces: (1) an occupancy-guided discriminator for precise boundary supervision, enabling stable single-step diffusion training; (2) an alpha head that leverages knowledge from pretrained diffusion models to predict appropriate removal regions with minimal overhead, thereby handling imperfect masks; and (3) a semantic-anchored verification pipeline (SAVP) that filters noisy instruction-based triplets to produce effect-aware supervision at scale. Using SAVP, we curate CORNE, which contains 280K verified removal pairs, and further annotate AnimeEraseBench and TextEraseBench to evaluate performance on more complex removal tasks. Experiments show that OSOR surpasses strong multi-step diffusion baselines in perceptual quality while achieving $4\times$ to $30\times$ faster inference.
2606.28094.paper_summary_zh: 現實世界中的物體移除面臨兩個主要挑戰：目標物體的非局部效應，例如陰影和反射，這些效應難以建模，以及用戶提供的遮罩通常不準確或不完整。基於擴散的模型擁有數十億的參數和數十個去噪步驟，在計算成本上取得強大的移除性能，這限制了它們在互動應用和邊緣設備上的使用。為了解決這些挑戰，我們提出了OSOR（單步物體移除），它同時實現了高效、考慮效果和對遮罩穩健的物體移除。具體來說，OSOR引入了：(1) 一個基於佔用的鑑別器，用於精確的邊界監督，使得穩定的單步擴散訓練成為可能；(2) 一個利用預訓練擴散模型知識的alpha頭，能以最小的開銷預測適當的移除區域，從而處理不完美的遮罩；以及(3) 一個語義錨定的驗證管道（SAVP），它過濾基於指令的噪聲三元組，以大規模產生考慮效果的監督。通過使用SAVP，我們策劃了CORNE，該數據集包含28萬個經過驗證的移除對，並進一步註釋了AnimeEraseBench和TextEraseBench，以評估在更複雜的移除任務上的性能。實驗顯示，OSOR在感知質量上超越了強大的多步擴散基線，同時實現了$4\times$到$30\times$的推理速度提升。
2606.28094.author: Qinming Zhou et.al.
2606.28094.authors: Qinming Zhou, Chenxi Sun, Deyang Kong, Junhao He, Xiangheng Tang, Peike Yu, Haotian Wu, Leilei Cao, Linfeng Zhang
